title: Whole Cake Island Comes Into View
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Reiju, Unknown person #6, Nami, Unknown person #7, Big Mom Pirates as The rescue team reaches Big Mom’s territory and learns how Sanji is trapped by family and political pressure.
scene: The Sanji retrieval team enters Big Mom’s sphere of influence, where every friendly face may be connected to the wedding trap.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His eyebrows were a bit too curly but...he was so kind! Such a gentleman!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His eyes are shaped like hearts, but...he knows so much about making sweets! He even taught me a few things! �

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We have the same hobbies, and... he's so manly... oh my...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hear his legs are black or something and that he's super strong... I'm sure he'd protect me, and...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Right?! Hahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Just so you know, his nickname "black leg" has nothing to do with his legs being black.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You get him, Don'cha?! Sanji's a super cool guy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Could it be... Have you already fallen in love with Sanji?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: L... L... LOVE?! Could you...I mean...I don't ...and Mama's orders are absolute anyway...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Since getting married is mandatory anyway... I just... well...

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Guess what?! I love Sanji too!

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: SAMESIES! What?! love 🙂 Sanji too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: SAMESIES! 🙂

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: OH! OH MY...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is a highly unexpected develop- ment!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think that his bride-to- be would turn out to be such a wonderful girl!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's no wonder Sanji's eyes have become heart- shaped!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We should keep this woman bound and gagged

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Otherwise she'll blab about our arrival and presence here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If word gets out that we've landed here on this island, which is basically the entryway to big mom's territory,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can forget about ever making it to Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How could you say such a thing, Pedro?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then let me ask you: How else can we ensure that she keeps her mouth shut?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't forget that this woman is big mom's daughter!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Well, that's true, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Pudding's scared of her parents too, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All the more reason for her to report us.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Someone knows

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I’m

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: SCRAWL SCRAWL

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Scribble scribble

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I can still forget!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: About Sanji...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Everyone on Totland...

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: They're all celebrating my coming wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Judge
dialogue.text: Apparently so are the Vinsmokes.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And Mama is ever so excited for the wedding cake!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't disobey an order from Mama, so...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way I could ever marry whomever I wanted, but ...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ever since I was a child, I've always wondered...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What sort of person will I end up getting married to?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And along came Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was so wonderful I thought he came out of one of my dreams... I was swept off my feet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But, the truth is,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In the end, he shared something with me.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I really want to marry you. But I can't."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: "I've gotta return to my friends."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Are you saying...

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: Sanji, turned, down. A. woman?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But... yeah... I totally get where he's coming from!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He obviously wants to continue his adventure... right? sniff

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And now that I've realized that that desire of his isn't some one-sided, foolish wish,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And seeing all of you here in totland now, risking your lives, just to bring him back, well...

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Whatever Mama's orders may be,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't imagine spending the rest of my life with someone that will regret his marriage so deeply!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I could never steal Sanji away from you guys.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Here... Follow this route.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: POINT

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's only known to us siblings.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only passage through Mama's territory by which you can hope to pass unnoticed.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Approach storyline with 60 dialogue beats. The crew moves from Zou toward Big Mom’s territory and begins to understand the scale of Sanji’s predicament.
